steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what Bellie's research is about. The answer must come directly from the text, not from Bellie's musical work or general knowledge.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Space travel: Never mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice B — Gravitational waves: The opening sentence says directly: "Musician and astronomer Darsan Swaroop Bellie researches gravitational waves." ✓
  • Choice C — Music history: Bellie composes music, but the text never describes music history as his research subject. ✗
  • Choice D — Ocean currents: Not mentioned anywhere in the passage. ✗
That matches Choice B — Gravitational waves.
